title: invoice â€” trait composition
description: Three owned traits. `BelongsToInvoice` is the FK trait for downstream models (InvoiceLine, CreditNote). `HasInvoiceLines` / `HasCreditNotes` are inverse-side conveniences on the Invoice model, exposing scoped query helpers (->activeLines(), ->issuedCreditNotes(), etc.). Order matters when composed with BelongsToTenant â€” tenant MUST come first so the scope chain observes the tenant context.

owned.description: Mixed into any domain model that carries an `invoice_id` FK. Adds the `invoice()` belongsTo relation. Used by InvoiceLine + CreditNote. Provides a `resolveInInvoice(?Invoice)` scope for cross-cutting queries. Refuses to save a row whose invoice_id points at an invoice in a different tenant than the row itself (defense-in-depth against cross-tenant FK smuggling).
usedBy: invoice::InvoiceLine (required invoice_id â€” every line anchored to exactly one invoice)
invoice::CreditNote (required original_invoice_id â€” via the `original_invoice()` relation; the trait's FK column is configurable)
composition_notes: Order: `BelongsToTenant` must appear BEFORE `BelongsToInvoice` in the trait list so the tenant scope resolves first.
For CreditNote, the FK column is `original_invoice_id` (not `invoice_id`) â€” override via `protected string $invoiceForeignKey = 'original_invoice_id';`.

owned.description: Composed onto the Invoice model itself. Adds `->lines()` (hasMany over InvoiceLine ordered by line_number), `->linesInDrafts()` (only when parent.status='draft'), `->nextLineNumber()` (returns MAX(line_number)+1), `->recomputeTotals()` (recalculates subtotal_cents / discount_amount_cents / tax_amount_cents / total_cents from SUM of lines).

Composed onto the Invoice model itself. Adds `->creditNotes()` (hasMany over CreditNote via original_invoice_id), `->issuedCreditNotes()` (scope filter status='issued'), `->appliedCreditNotes()` (status='applied'), `->totalCreditedAmount()` (SUM of amount_cents across all non-void credit notes), `->remainingCreditableAmount()` (total_cents - total_credited).

framework.reason: Invoice + InvoiceLine (soft-delete permitted for draft/void invoices only per observer). CreditNote does NOT use SoftDeletes â€” every credit note row is an immutable financial record.

foundation.reason: Invoice + CreditNote (searchable by invoice_number / credit_note_number / customer name via billing_address). InvoiceLine is not searchable (accessed via relation from Invoice).

tenants.reason: Every owned row carries tenant_id per tenancy-columns.md Â§3.

audit.reason: Every write to invoices / invoice_lines / credit_notes is compliance-relevant (SOX Â§404 + GAAP + IFRS + VAT Directive â€” financial retention 7 years, 10 for Enterprise).

activity.reason: Invoice + CreditNote â€” admin actions feed the staff-visible activity feed. NOT InvoiceLine â€” high-volume; already covered by the audit trail.

invoice.notes: Order matters: BelongsToTenant precedes every scope-observing trait. HasInvoiceLines + HasCreditNotes are inverse-side conveniences. SoftDeletes permitted for draft/void only via observer refusal.

invoice_line.notes: SoftDeletes for draft-invoice line removal (before finalize). NO HasActivityLog â€” high-volume; already covered by audit trail. NO Searchable â€” lines are accessed via relation from Invoice.

credit_note.notes: NO SoftDeletes â€” credit notes are immutable financial records; retained indefinitely (hard-deleted only via TenantErased FK CASCADE, and even then archived first). Auditable + HasActivityLog because every void/apply is an ops decision worth surfacing in the activity feed.
